channel.title: Frontion Geopolitical News
channel.description: Real-time geopolitical news headlines curated by AI

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸🇹🇼 Taiwan tops Xi agenda in upcoming Trump-Beijing summit
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping has made Taiwan the top priority for his upcoming summit with Trump in Beijing, a shift from last year when he set the issue aside. China is pushing Trump to clarify he will not support Taiwan independence.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇩🇪🪖 Hegseth orders withdrawal of 5,000 US troops from Germany
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth ordered the withdrawal of approximately 5,000 US troops from Germany within 6-12 months, following tensions between Trump and German Chancellor Merz over the Iran war and NATO burden-sharing.

item.title: 🤖🇺🇸⚔️ Google, Nvidia and tech giants sign AI deals with Pentagon
item.description: Eight major tech companies including Google, Nvidia, SpaceX, Microsoft, Amazon and OpenAI have signed agreements with the Pentagon to deploy AI on classified military networks. The DoD aims to make the US military an "AI-first fighting force."

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Russia Launches Record 400-Plus Drone Attack on Ukraine
item.description: Russia fired over 400 drones at Ukraine in a daytime attack, injuring 10 people in Ternopil, marking the largest drone assault of the war as peace talks remain stalled.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚖️ Trump Declares Iran War "Terminated" as War Powers Deadline Arrives
item.description: The White House says the ceasefire has "terminated" hostilities for the purposes of the congressional war powers deadline, as Trump huddles with military leaders over potential new strikes.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukraine Announces Army Reform Plan to Address Infantry Shortages
item.description: Ukraine unveiled plans for summer military reforms to tackle infantry shortages and discharge longest-serving soldiers, four years into the grinding war with stalled peace talks.

item.title: 🛢️💰 Investors Running Out of Time to Brace for Oil Price Shock
item.description: Markets focused on AI boom and hopes of a short Iran war have yet to price in a potential doubling of physical oil prices as the Strait of Hormuz remains disrupted.

item.title: ⚡🌍 Iran War "Supercharging" Global Shift to Renewable Energy
item.description: The Middle East conflict is accelerating the worldwide transition to renewable energy sources as countries seek to reduce dependence on oil from the volatile region.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇩🇪 US to Withdraw 5,000 Troops From Germany
item.description: The Pentagon announced the withdrawal of 5,000 US troops from Germany amid a widening rift between President Trump and German Chancellor Merz over the Iran war.

item.title: 🛢️💰 Barclays Raises 2026 Brent Forecast to $100
item.description: Barclays raised its 2026 Brent crude forecast from $85 to $100 per barrel, citing prolonged Strait of Hormuz disruption from the ongoing Iran conflict.

item.title: ⛽🇺🇸 California Gasoline Hits $6 Per Gallon
item.description: Motorists in California are paying $6 per gallon for gasoline, the highest price in two years, as the Iran war and Hormuz blockade drive fuel costs higher.

item.title: 🏛️🇺🇸 Trump Tells Congress Iran War "Terminated"
item.description: President Trump sent letters to Congress asserting that hostilities with Iran have "terminated," attempting to avoid the 60-day War Powers deadline that would require congressional authorization.

item.title: 💰🇮🇷 Iranian Elite Family Founded Major Crypto Exchange Used by IRGC
item.description: Reuters investigation reveals the Kharrazi family, one of Iran's most powerful families, founded Nobitex crypto exchange which has become central to moving funds beyond US sanctions during the Iran war.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇦🇺 Japan-Australia Seal $14.4B Frigate Deal in Historic Defense Pact
item.description: Japan and Australia signed contracts for a $14.4 billion warship deal, marking Japan's largest defense export. The Mogami-class frigates will be built for the Australian Navy, deepening defense ties between US allies in the Indo-Pacific.

item.title: 🇩🇪🛡️ Germany Unveils Strategy to Become Europe's Strongest Military by 2039
item.description: Germany announced a comprehensive defense modernization strategy aimed at becoming Europe's strongest conventional military force within 15 years. The plan comes as Trump threatens to reduce US troops stationed in Germany.

item.title: 🤖⚔️ Pentagon Seeks $54 Billion Pivot to AI-Powered Warfare
item.description: The Pentagon's proposed budget includes $54 billion for AI and autonomous systems, signaling a major shift toward AI-powered warfare. The request comes alongside a record $75 billion for drones as the US military adapts to lessons from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇯🇵💰 Japan Intervenes to Support Yen After Oil-Driven Selloff
item.description: Japan spent an estimated $35 billion supporting its currency as the yen hit near two-year lows against the dollar, with authorities warning they are ready to intervene again. The selloff was worsened by oil price spikes linked to the Iran war.

item.title: 🇺🇸💵 Fed Officials Say Oil Shock Ends Rate-Cut Bias, Hike Possible
item.description: Federal Reserve policymakers who dissented this week said the Iran war oil price shock means the central bank can no longer lean toward rate cuts, with borrowing cost increases now possible as inflation risks grow.

item.title: 🛢️🌍 US Gas Glut Stranded as Asia, Europe Scramble for Supply
item.description: The Iran war has boosted globally traded natural gas prices while West Texas gas remains so abundant that some producers must pay to have it taken away, highlighting a stark geographic imbalance in energy markets.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺⚔️ Trump Attacks European Leaders as Transatlantic Rift Widens
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has intensified criticism of European leaders over their stance on the Iran war, with Berlin saying it is prepared for reduced U.S. troop presence as the diplomatic divide deepens.

item.title: 🇨🇳💻 Huawei Expects 60% Jump in AI Chip Revenue as China Demand Surges
item.description: Huawei expects revenue from its AI chips to jump at least 60% this year, boosted by strong demand from Chinese companies seeking domestic alternatives amid U.S. export restrictions on advanced semiconductors.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Navy turns to AI firm to counter Iranian mines in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US Navy awarded a contract to AI firm Domino to enhance mine-hunting capabilities in the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world's most critical shipping lanes, amid ongoing tensions with Iran.

item.title: 🌍 WHO delays pandemic treaty amid pathogen-sharing dispute
item.description: World Health Organization member states extended talks on pathogen-sharing rules, delaying the pandemic treaty negotiations. The dispute centers on how pathogens and vaccines should be shared globally.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korean exports surge 48% as AI chip boom continues
item.description: South Korean exports rose for an 11th consecutive month in April, beating forecasts with a 48% year-on-year increase, as global demand for AI infrastructure drove semiconductor sales.

item.title: ⚽ Protesters urge FIFA to ban Iran from World Cup
item.description: Demonstrators outside the FIFA Congress in Vancouver called for Iran's soccer team to be banned from the World Cup, arguing the team represents the IRGC, not the Iranian people.
